posting.sourceTitle: Roofers JAC of Capital District Local # 241
posting.sponsorName: Roofers JAC of the Capital District, Local Union #241
posting.locationSummary: Albany, NY; Capital District, Mohawk Valley, and North Country regions
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain and submit applications in person at Local Union #241 in Albany every Tuesday from 8:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Local Union #241, 890 Third Street, Suite 211, Albany, NY 12206
posting.applicationHours: Every Tuesday, 8:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have completed at least 10th grade education.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test, at the sponsor's expense, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have completed at least 10th grade education.
Must achieve a minimum score of 40 points on the evaluation form in order to be placed on the rank list.
Must sign a statement and be physically able to perform the work required of a Roofer.
Must be able to lift 70 pounds.
Must be able to work at heights on low-pitch and steep roofing.
Must be able to climb ladders and scaffolding.
Must be able to work in hot and cold weather.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must pass a drug test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have completed 10th grade, be physically able to do roofing work, have reliable transportation, and pass a drug test after selection.
posting.contactName: Roofers JAC of the Capital District, Local Union #241
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact Roofers JAC of the Capital District, Local Union #241 at (518) 258-0521.
